title: winfile.exe
html:
winfile.exe

Windows File Manager executable

Execute

Performs execution of specified file, can be used as a defense evasion

winfile.exe {PATH:.exe}

Execute an executable file with WinFile as a parent process. — MITRE: T1202 — Privileges: User
